catalog.title: 1976 Seiko Catalog Vol.1
catalog.note: JDM annual. Men's mechanical + quartz lines expose calibers; ladies/fancy/stopwatch pages had refs too small at 210 DPI (empty-ref dropped by merge).
catalog.method: vision extraction in-harness (no paid API): pages rendered, read by Claude subagents writing batch JSON
